name: openmeta-cli
description: OpenMeta CLI - Developer's daily open source growth companion

scripts.lint: biome lint --max-diagnostics=1000 src test index.ts package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.format: biome check --write --linter-enabled=false src test index.ts package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.format:check: biome check --linter-enabled=false src test index.ts package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.check: biome check --linter-enabled=false src test index.ts package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.ci:biome: biome ci --linter-enabled=false src test index.ts package.json tsconfig.json
